# bigbud

bigbud is an AI workspace for developers. It brings chats, browser research, files, git workflows, and multiple AI providers into one place so work can continue without losing context.

## Canonical pages
- Home: https://bigbud.app/
- Download: https://bigbud.app/download/
- Changelog: https://bigbud.app/changelog/
- GitHub: https://github.com/youpele52/bigbud

## Product summary
- Category: AI workspace, developer productivity software
- Platforms: macOS, Windows, Linux
- Core use cases: coding, research, writing, project work, switching between AI providers
- Key workflows: browser research, file previews, git review, automations, persistent threads

## Recent product direction
- bigbud has been shipping frequent changelog updates across provider support, browser and PDF workflows, git tooling, automations, notes, file annotations, and reliability.
- The changelog is the best source for current capabilities and recent release history.

## Recommended source pages
- Use the changelog for release history and latest features.
- Use the download page for installation and platform availability.
- Use the homepage for the high-level product description and positioning.
